summary: BGMI gaming project with user registration flow. Registration uses a multi-step flow: Step 1 (Name/Phone/BGMI ID), Step 2 (Internet Identity authentication - auto-triggered), Step 3 (Done - redirects to Home Page). Fix in progress for 'Connecting...' stuck bug on Step 2.
architectural_notes: Internet Identity authentication only works on deployed (live) canister, not in draft/local environment
Registration flow is 3 steps: Step 1 (Name/Phone/BGMI ID), Step 2 (Internet Identity auth), Step 3 (Done)
known_issues: 'Connecting...' button stuck in loading state on Step 2 of registration - Internet Identity popup not opening

existing_features.title: In RegisterPage.tsx, when the user reaches Step 2 (Authenticate), automatically trigger the Internet Identity login popup via `useInternetIdentity` hook without requiring any manual button click. Use a `useEffect` that fires when the step becomes 2 to call the login function immediately.

Fix the 'Connecting...' stuck loading state bug on Step 2 of RegisterPage.tsx. The button must not remain permanently in a loading/spinning state. Reset the connecting state if the Internet Identity login is cancelled, fails, or times out, and re-enable the button so the user can retry.

After successful registration completion (Step 3 - Done) in RegisterPage.tsx, redirect the user to the Home Page ('/') using the router's navigate function instead of staying on the registration page or going to the dashboard.

new_feature_requests.summary: Auto-trigger Internet Identity popup on Step 2 of registration flow
Fix 'Connecting...' stuck bug on Step 2 (Authenticate) of registration
Redirect user to Home Page after successful registration (Step 3 - Done)
